title: GeoMx Digital Spatial Profiler (DSP) Protocol v2 - University of Minnesota TMCs
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"b0421","text":"The nanoString GeoMx‱ Digital Spatial Profiler (DSP) is a platform that allows high-plex profiling at the protein and RNA level, providing spatial and temporal assessment of tumors in frozen or formalin-fixed paraffin-embedded limited tissue sample.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":20,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":20,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"2bvov","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bu4p1","text":"The following protocols/manuals were used at the University of Minnesota TMCs in collaboration with the University of Minnesota Genomics Center.
